title: Stratelatos (the general)
name: Theodore
troparia: (Tone 4) Through the recruitment of truth you became a brilliant general of the heavenly King, O Theodore.* You wisely armed yourself with the weapons of faith,* you vanquished armies of demons,* proving yourself to be a victorious passion-bearer.** Therefore, we unceasingly bless you with faith.
kontakia: (Tone 2) By the courage of your soul, you put on the armor of faith* and took the Word of God as a spear in your hand,* and thus you vanquished the enemy,* O Theodore, exceedingly great among the martyrs* In their company, unceasingly pray to Christ God for us all.
